'''thokataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hoardy|hoardy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hoardy|hoardy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thokataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thokatithi|thokatithi]] || [[word:thokatiji|thokatiji]] || [[word:thokatishi|thokatishi]] || [[word:thokatiki|thokatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thokatuthuthu|thokatuthuthu]] || [[word:thokatujuju|thokatujuju]] || [[word:thokatushushu|thokatushushu]] || [[word:thokatukuku|thokatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokatuthu|thokatuthu]] || [[word:thokatuju|thokatuju]] || [[word:thokatushu|thokatushu]] || [[word:thokatuku|thokatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokatufthuf|thokatufthuf]] || [[word:thokatufjuf|thokatufjuf]] || [[word:thokatufshuf|thokatufshuf]] || [[word:thokatufkuf|thokatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thokatethe|thokatethe]] || [[word:thokateje|thokateje]] || [[word:thokateshe|thokateshe]] || [[word:thokateke|thokateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thokatothotho|thokatothotho]] || [[word:thokatojojo|thokatojojo]] || [[word:thokatoshosho|thokatoshosho]] || [[word:thokatokoko|thokatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokatotho|thokatotho]] || [[word:thokatojo|thokatojo]] || [[word:thokatosho|thokatosho]] || [[word:thokatoko|thokatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokatofthof|thokatofthof]] || [[word:thokatofjof|thokatofjof]] || [[word:thokatofshof|thokatofshof]] || [[word:thokatofkof|thokatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfthĂŻf|thokatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfjĂŻf|thokatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfshĂŻf|thokatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfkĂŻf|thokatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thokatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thokatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thokatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thokatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfthĂŻf|thokatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfjĂŻf|thokatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfshĂŻf|thokatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfkĂŻf|thokatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfthĂŻf|thokatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfjĂŻf|thokatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfshĂŻf|thokatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thokatĂŻfkĂŻf|thokatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thokatĂŠthĂŠ|thokatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thokatĂŠjĂŠ|thokatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thokatĂŠshĂŠ|thokatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thokatĂŠkĂŠ|thokatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thokatathatha|thokatathatha]] || [[word:thokatajaja|thokatajaja]] || [[word:thokatashasha|thokatashasha]] || [[word:thokatakaka|thokatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokatatha|thokatatha]] || [[word:thokataja|thokataja]] || [[word:thokatasha|thokatasha]] || [[word:thokataka|thokataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokatafthaf|thokatafthaf]] || [[word:thokatafjaf|thokatafjaf]] || [[word:thokatafshaf|thokatafshaf]] || [[word:thokatafkaf|thokatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thokatasha|thokatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thokatshĂ«sha|thokatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thokatrosha|thokatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thokatmusha|thokatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thokatyasha|thokatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothokatnkshĂ«sha|gothokatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothokatnkrosha|gothokatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothokatnkmusha|gothokatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothokatnkyasha|gothokatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thokakatasha|thokakatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thokakatshĂ«sha|thokakatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thokakatrosha|thokakatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thokakatmusha|thokakatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thokakatyasha|thokakatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothokakatnkshĂ«sha|gothokakatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothokakatnkrosha|gothokakatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothokakatnkmusha|gothokakatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothokakatnkyasha|gothokakatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thekĂŠtasha|thekĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thekĂŠtshĂ«sha|thekĂŠtshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thekĂŠtrosha|thekĂŠtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thekĂŠtmusha|thekĂŠtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thekĂŠtyasha|thekĂŠtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothekĂŠtnkshĂ«sha|gothekĂŠtnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothekĂŠtnkrosha|gothekĂŠtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothekĂŠtnkmusha|gothekĂŠtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothekĂŠtnkyasha|gothekĂŠtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thokfatasha|thokfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thokfatshĂ«sha|thokfatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thokfatrosha|thokfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thokfatmusha|thokfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thokfatyasha|thokfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothokfatnkshĂ«sha|gothokfatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothokfatnkrosha|gothokfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothokfatnkmusha|gothokfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothokfatnkyasha|gothokfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
